title: Create the literary AI project structure with:
job:
Create the literary AI project structure with:

1. Project directory structure with:
   - gui/ (main_window.py, settings.py)
   - llm_integration/ (llm_connector.py, prompt_engine.py)
   - universe_bible/ (bible_db.py, bible_editor.py)
   - content_generator/ (chapter_creator.py, serial_planner.py)
   - storage/ (project_saver.py, bible_saver.py)
   - main.py

2. Setup Python environment with:
   - venv
   - requirements.txt (tkinter, transformers, sqlite3)

3. Create README.md with project documentation

4. Test setup by running main.py to verify structure
